label: Misc damage
description: A damage entry applied to specific body part groups on a pawn at spawn time, used to create pre-existing wounds.

damage.label: Damage type
damage.description: DamageDef that defines the type of damage inflicted.

groups.label: Body part groups
groups.description: BodyPartGroupDefs targeted by this damage entry.

chance.label: Chance
chance.description: Probability (0–1) that this damage is applied during generation.
